channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Lenovo raises Legion Go 2 Z2 Extreme 2TB price to $2849.99 on official store - VideoCardz.com
item.description:
1. Lenovo raises Legion Go 2 Z2 Extreme 2TB price to $2849.99 on official store  VideoCardz.com
  2. Lenovo hikes Legion Go 2 handheld gaming PC to almost $3,000 for 2 TB model — Handheld now costs more than AMD's Strix Halo devices despite relatively weaker Z2 Extreme chip  Tom's Hardware
  3. Lenovo Legion Go S (SteamOS) jumps to $1050, but Best Buy has the better one for $900  Notebookcheck
  4. The Lenovo Legion Go 2 handheld costs more than two Nvidia RTX 5080 GPUs — and that's genuinely absurd  TechRadar
  5. Call 911, Lenovo now wants nearly $3,000 for its Legion Go 2 handheld, but it might actually be discontinued  GamesRadar+

item.title: The next MacBook Neo already sounds like a big upgrade for one reason - 9to5Mac
item.description:
1. The next MacBook Neo already sounds like a big upgrade for one reason  9to5Mac
  2. Mac Neo should be the follow up to the huge success of the MacBook Neo  AppleInsider
  3. I tested three Windows laptops in the MacBook Neo’s price range — there’s no contest  The Verge
  4. Apple MacBook Neo opens the door to $32bn TAM: BofA  Investing.com
  5. How Foxconn is winning a bigger slice of MacBook Neo orders  digitimes

item.title: I replaced my notes app with Gemini’s new Notebooks — and I’m not going back - Tom's Guide
item.description:
1. I replaced my notes app with Gemini’s new Notebooks — and I’m not going back  Tom's Guide
  2. Try notebooks in Gemini to easily keep track of projects  blog.google
  3. Google Just Put NotebookLM Inside Gemini: Here’s What You Can Do Now  Geeky Gadgets
  4. Gemini app rolling out ‘notebooks’ to organize chats & files, integrates with NotebookLM  9to5Google
  5. Gemini just got a new notebooks feature that syncs with NotebookLM  XDA

item.title: Finally, a Foldable That Fits: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide Leaks a Massive 4:3 Screen Upgrade - Geeky Gadgets
item.description:
1. Finally, a Foldable That Fits: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide Leaks a Massive 4:3 Screen Upgrade  Geeky Gadgets
  2. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 launch date leaks  Mashable
  3. Date and location for Samsung's next Unpacked event just leaked  Android Authority
  4. Is the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra Worth the $1,999 Price Tag? Everything We Know  Geeky Gadgets
  5. Samsung to unveil new ‘Wide’ foldable alongside Galaxy Z Fold 8, S Pen: Report  The Indian Express

item.title: Microsoft’s new Windows 11 preview program finally makes feature testing simple - Windows Central
item.description:
1. Microsoft’s new Windows 11 preview program finally makes feature testing simple  Windows Central
  2. Microsoft’s “commitment to Windows quality” starts with overhaul of beta program  Ars Technica
  3. Microsoft finally lets Windows 11 testers unlock experimental features without ViVeTool  The Verge
  4. Microsoft Weekly: Microsoft reworks Windows Insider Program and hands out some batteries  Neowin
  5. Microsoft Windows 11 Insider Program Overhaul: What's New in Experimental & Beta Channels?  National Today
